title: Crispy Malaysian Crumble Cakes
description: Moist semolina cakes with a crunchy crumble topping inspired by Malaysian flavors. Perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin.
In a large bowl, whisk together semolina, flour, and sweet.
In a separate bowl, mix crumble and cinnamon (if using).
Add the crumble mixture to the semolina mixture and stir to combine.
Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
Bake for 18-20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a cake comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
